title: Biosécurité optimisée : petit matériel et équipement dédiés par zone et par bâtiment
description: A practical guide for improving biosecurity in broiler chicken production by assigning dedicated small equipment and tools to specific zones and buildings. It outlines the recommended sectorization of work clothing, tools, and hygiene materials per reception area, work zone, and rearing zone, and details the benefits, costs, and best practices to prevent pathogen spread.
